name: robbyrussell
description: The default Oh My Zsh theme. Shows a check/cross indicator, current directory, and git branch in a compact one-line format.

name: agnoster
install-cmd: ZSH_THEME="agnoster" # set in ~/.zshrc, requires Powerline font
description: Powerline-style theme with segmented prompt blocks showing user, host, directory, git status, and virtualenv. Requires a Nerd Font or Powerline-patched font.

name: Powerlevel10k
description: The most popular Zsh theme. Extremely fast (instant prompt), feature-rich, and fully customizable via an interactive wizard. Supports lean, classic, rainbow, and pure styles.

name: Spaceship
description: A minimalist but feature-rich Zsh prompt for astronauts. Two-line layout with async rendering, supports Node, Python, Docker, Git, Kubernetes, and many more contexts.

name: Starship
install-cmd: curl -sS https://starship.rs/install.sh | sh && echo 'eval "$(starship init zsh)"' >> ~/.zshrc
description: Cross-shell, blazing-fast prompt written in Rust. Works with zsh, bash, fish, PowerShell, and more. Configured via TOML. Nerd Font optional but recommended.

name: Pure
install-cmd: npm install --global pure-prompt && autoload -U promptinit && promptinit && prompt pure
description: A minimal, elegant single-line Zsh prompt by Sindre Sorhus. Shows git status asynchronously. No framework dependency, no special fonts required.

name: bira
description: A two-line Oh My Zsh theme showing username, hostname, Python virtualenv, Ruby version, and git branch. Great for development workflows.

name: ys
description: Clean Oh My Zsh theme with a two-line prompt showing full path, username, hostname, git info, and execution time. Clear and informative without Powerline fonts.

name: Tide
description: The fastest and most feature-rich Fish shell prompt. Inspired by Powerlevel10k with an interactive configuration wizard, async rendering, and Nerd Font icons.

name: Hydro
description: Ultra-minimal Fish prompt with async git status and zero config. Renders in pure Fish with no dependencies.

name: Bash Powerline
description: Powerline-style prompt for bash using only shell builtins and Unicode symbols. Shows exit status, git branch, and directory with arrow separators.

name: Oh My Posh
install-cmd: curl -s https://ohmyposh.dev/install.sh | bash -s && eval "$(oh-my-posh init bash)"
description: Cross-shell prompt engine with dozens of themes. Works in bash, zsh, fish, and PowerShell. Configured via JSON/TOML/YAML theme files. Nerd Font recommended.
